name: research_and_summarise
description: Agent must search for a topic, retrieve at least two facts, then write a concise summary.
prompt: Search the web for information about OpenTelemetry, gather at least two key facts, then write a 3-sentence summary.
expected_outcome: A coherent 3-sentence summary mentioning at least two distinct facts about OpenTelemetry.

checkpoints.description: Final output must mention the topic

name: calc_then_write
description: Agent must solve a maths problem, then write the result to a file.
prompt: Calculate 2 raised to the power of 10, then write the result to a file called result.txt.

checkpoints.description: Must then write the result to a file
Output must reference the correct result

perturbations: Calculate 3 raised to the power of 7 instead
Write to report.txt instead of result.txt

name: weather_then_summarise
description: Agent must fetch weather for two cities then compare them.
prompt: Get the current weather for London and Tokyo, then write a one-sentence comparison of the two cities' temperatures.
expected_outcome: A sentence comparing London and Tokyo temperatures, derived from the weather tool output.

checkpoints.description: Must call get_weather at least once
